title: rubus squalidus
intro: Rubus squalidus, also known as the bramble or Himalayan blackberry, is a thorny, deciduous shrub native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Rubus squalidus include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or used topically to reap its benefits.
